LAW AND MOTION, DEPT. 302, THE TENTATIVE RULING IS ADOPTED AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF ROBERT GUTIERREZ'S MOTION TO STAY COMPLAINT FOR COURT: (1) ORDER INVALIDATING PURPORTED AMENDMENT TO TRUST BASED ON LACK OF CAPACITY, UNDUE INFLUENCE AND FRAUD; (2) FINANCIAL ELDER ABUSE; (3) CONVERSION; (4) UNJUST ENRICHMENT; (5) RECOVERY OF PERSONAL PROPERTY; (6) DECLARATORY RELIEF AND CONSTRUCTIVE TRUST; AND (7) CANCELLATION OF INSTRUMENT PURSUANT TO STIPULATION IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED, AND THE PARTIES HAVE STIPULATED TO THE RELIEF SOUGHT. THE COURT MODIFIED AND SIGNED THE PROPOSED ORDER INCLUDED WITH THE MOVING PAPERS. JUDGE: ETHAN P. SCHULMAN; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; NOT REPORTED. (302/EPS)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Stay Complaint For Court: (1) Order Invalidating Purported Amendment To Trust Based On Lack Of Capacity, Undue Influence And Fraud; (2) Financial Elder Abuse; (3) Conversion; (4) Unjust Enrichment; (5) Recovery Of Personal Property; (6) Declaratory Relief And Constructive Trust; And (7) Cancellation Of Instrument Pursuant To Stipulation; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Thereof
Off Calendar Aug-21-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

RULING: There being no appearance or objection, the tentative ruling is adopted as follows:

PLAINTIFF ROBERT GUTIERREZ'S Motion To Stay Complaint For Court: (1) Order Invalidating Purported Amendment To Trust Based On Lack Of Capacity, Undue Influence And Fraud; (2) Financial Elder Abuse; (3) Conversion; (4) Unjust Enrichment; (5) Recovery Of Personal Property; (6) Declaratory Relief And Constructive Trust; And (7) Cancellation Of Instrument Pursuant To Stipulation is GRANTED. No opposition filed, and the parties have stipulated to the relief sought.

The Court modified and signed the proposed order included with the moving papers.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.
